steps.title: Spot the temporal marker
steps.content: The key clue is in 1979—a specific year in the past. This temporal marker signals which tense is needed.

steps.title: Choose the tense that matches the time
steps.content: Simple past tense was born correctly marks a completed action at a specific past moment. The other forms—present (is/is being) and present perfect (has been)—don't align with a specific past date. That matches choice A — A is correct.
